import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    # Tile and color constants
    BALL, PYRAMID, HEX = 3, 5, 11
    BLUE, GREEN, YELLOW = 3, 2, 5
    FLOOR = 1

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # --- Find blue pyramid in grid (before pickup) ---
    blue_pyr_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1)

    # --- Find yellow hex in next_state grid ---
    yh_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yh_count = jnp.sum(yh_mask)
    yh_y = jnp.sum(yy * yh_mask) / jnp.maximum(yh_count, 1)
    yh_x = jnp.sum(xx * yh_mask) / jnp.maximum(yh_count, 1)

    # Agent positions
    agent_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_pos_prev = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)

    # --- Pocket states ---
    prev_holding_green_ball = (state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    next_holding_green_ball = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    prev_pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)
    next_pocket_empty = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)

    # Pickup event: went from empty to holding green ball
    pickup_event = prev_pocket_empty & next_holding_green_ball

    # Putdown event: was holding green ball, now empty
    putdown_event = prev_holding_green_ball & next_pocket_empty

    # --- Phase 1: approach blue pyramid (only if not yet holding green ball) ---
    dist_to_pyr_prev = jnp.abs(agent_pos_prev[0] - blue_pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_pos_prev[1] - blue_pyr_x)
    dist_to_pyr_next = jnp.abs(agent_pos[0] - blue_pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_pos[1] - blue_pyr_x)
    approach_pyr = (dist_to_pyr_prev - dist_to_pyr_next) * 0.05

    # Phase 1 reward: shaping toward pyramid when not holding green ball
    phase1_reward = jnp.where(~prev_holding_green_ball & (blue_pyr_count > 0), approach_pyr, 0.0)

    # Pickup bonus
    pickup_bonus = jnp.where(pickup_event, 1.0, 0.0)

    # --- Phase 2: approach yellow hex while holding green ball ---
    dist_to_hex_prev = jnp.abs(agent_pos_prev[0] - yh_y) + jnp.abs(agent_pos_prev[1] - yh_x)
    dist_to_hex_next = jnp.abs(agent_pos[0] - yh_y) + jnp.abs(agent_pos[1] - yh_x)
    approach_hex = (dist_to_hex_prev - dist_to_hex_next) * 0.05

    phase2_reward = jnp.where(next_holding_green_ball & (yh_count > 0), approach_hex, 0.0)

    # --- Phase 3: check if green ball placed adjacent to yellow hex ---
    # After putdown, find green ball in grid and check adjacency to yellow hex
    green_ball_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gb_count = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask)
    gb_y = jnp.sum(yy * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(gb_count, 1)
    gb_x = jnp.sum(xx * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(xx * green_ball_mask, 0).shape[0]
    # Recalculate gb_x properly
    gb_x = jnp.sum(xx * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(gb_count, 1)

    # Manhattan distance between green ball and yellow hex
    dist_ball_hex = jnp.abs(gb_y - yh_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x - yh_x)

    # Success: green ball placed adjacent (dist=1) to yellow hex
    success = putdown_event & (gb_count > 0) & (yh_count > 0) & (dist_ball_hex <= 1.5)
    success_bonus = jnp.where(success, 5.0, 0.0)

    # Small penalty for wrong putdown (placed but not adjacent)
    wrong_putdown = putdown_event & (gb_count > 0) & (yh_count > 0) & (dist_ball_hex > 1.5)
    wrong_penalty = jnp.where(wrong_putdown, -0.3, 0.0)

    total_reward = (phase1_reward + pickup_bonus + phase2_reward + success_bonus + wrong_penalty).astype(jnp.float32)
    return total_reward
